variants: Paz Ojeda specializes in landscape architecture, drawing on expertise developed throughout their academic career. As a doctoral student, Paz was mentored by Baris Coskun, whose guidance greatly shaped their professional pathway. The Charcoal Wind Endowment provided primary funding for their innovative projects in landscape design. Holding an Umbra Ranger Designation, Paz operates with a recognized level of professionalism in the field. Their work has been published in Maple & Quill Books, establishing them as a voice in contemporary landscape architecture literature.
